title: helichrysum heliotropifolium
intro: Helichrysum heliotropifolium, also known as the Turnefort's helichrysum or Helichrysum cymosum, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum heliotropifolium include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in various forms, such as essential oil, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
